$description: Status indicator component color tokens for displaying system and content states.

accessibility-background.$description: Background color for accessibility status indicators. Use to highlight accessibility-related features or compliance status.

blue.$description: Color for blue status indicators. Use for informational states, in-progress items, or neutral status without specific semantic meaning.

gray.$description: Color for gray status indicators. Use for inactive, disabled, or neutral states that don't require color semantics.

green.$description: Color for green status indicators. Use for success states, completed items, active/running status, or positive conditions.

orange.$description: Color for orange status indicators. Use for warning states, items needing attention, or moderate priority issues.

orange-outline.$description: Outline/border color for orange status indicators in light themes. Provides visual definition for outlined warning status variants.

purple.$description: Color for purple status indicators. Use for special states, premium features, or custom priority levels.

red.$description: Color for red status indicators. Use for error states, failed items, critical issues, or stopped/inactive status.

yellow.$description: Color for yellow status indicators. Use for caution states, pending items, or situations requiring user awareness.

yellow-outline.$description: Outline/border color for yellow status indicators in light themes. Provides visual definition for outlined caution status variants.
